name: GKE cluster network policy not enabled
description: Kubernetes NetworkPolicy enforcement is disabled on this GKE cluster. Without it, all pods can communicate with all other pods in the cluster, enabling lateral movement if one pod is compromised.
remediation: Enable NetworkPolicy when creating the cluster. Define NetworkPolicy resources to restrict inter-pod communication to only what is required. Consider using Google's Dataplane V2 (eBPF-based) for enhanced network enforcement.
